message:
fix: redaction streaming race, conflict pruning, minor cleanup

Redaction middleware:
- Snapshot redactionCfg under lock per-request to avoid SetRedactionConfig races
- GetRedactionConfig returns copy, not live pointer
- Fix request body redaction for chunked requests (ContentLength -1)
- Overhaul Flush() for SSE/chunked: passthrough mode after first Flush,
  finalized guard prevents double-write corruption

Conflict detector:
- Nil/empty guards on NegotiateConflict and NotifyConflict
- Hourly pruning of stale conflicts to prevent unbounded memory growth

Cleanup:
- interrupt.go: remove unused PreserveContext field
- root.go: update --robot-terse help string (add E:errors, ^:attention)
- Update beads issue tracker metadata

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -53,7 +53,6 @@ type InterruptOptions struct {
 	NoWait          bool     // Don't wait for ready state after interrupt
 	TimeoutMs       int      // Timeout for waiting for ready state (default 10000)
 	PollMs          int      // Poll interval (default 300)
-	PreserveContext bool     // Log context before interrupt (for potential resume)
 	DryRun          bool     // Preview mode: show what would happen without executing
 	RequestID       string   // External request identifier for REST parity
 	CorrelationID   string   // Correlation identifier for tracing request/outcome/verification
